name: Cardamom Coffee Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Scald milk and allow it to cool to lukewarm.
2. Dissolve yeast in 1 tablespoon sugar with the lukewarm milk. Stir until combined.
3. Gradually add 6 cups of flour, stirring continuously. Cover well and let rise until doubled in size and light, about 1-1/2 hours.
4. In a separate bowl, combine softened butter, remaining sugar, salt, egg yolks, cardamom, and 3 cups flour. Mix thoroughly. Set aside the remaining 1/4 cup flour for kneading on a floured surface or pastry cloth.
5. Turn dough onto a greased bowl. Cover well. Let rise until doubled in size, about 1-1/2 hours.
6. Divide risen dough into two portions for two coffee cakes (braids). Cut each portion into three equal pieces. Roll each piece into a log measuring approximately 16 inches long. Gather the rolls together at one end and braid them, pinching the other ends to secure. Place braids on a baking sheet.
7. Allow braids to rise until doubled in size, about 45 minutes. Brush each braid with milk and sprinkle with sugar before baking.
8. Bake in a moderate oven (375°F) for 25-30 minutes.
Yield: 2 coffee cakes
